entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 108 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 108 IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 70S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HOT
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT
